ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "variable" TEXT /* Short variable name (e.g., FLNS) */,
  "long_name" TEXT /* Expanded name for the variable */,
  "component" TEXT /* Component of the climate system (e.g., atm for atmosphere) */,
  "experiment" TEXT /* Experiment identifier (e.g., 20C) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily) */,
  "vertical_levels" INTEGER /* Number of vertical levels used in the data */,
  "spatial_domain" TEXT /* Geographic domain for the data (e.g., global) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement (e.g., W/m2) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start timestamp of the data collection */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End timestamp of the data collection */,
  "path" TEXT /* File path to the data stored in S3 */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground station) */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Numerical score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the data is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_experiment FOREIGN KEY ("experiment") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment (e.g., 20C) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "lead_researcher" TEXT /* Name of the lead researcher for the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* User's affiliation (e.g., institution, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed data entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the quality check */,
  "checker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality check */,
  "method_used" TEXT /* Method or tool used to perform the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_checker_id FOREIGN KEY ("checker_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the variable */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata (e.g., manual entry, automated system) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Numerical score indicating the confidence level of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset to which this version belongs */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "released_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed release notes for the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vertical_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vertical level */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated dataset */,
  "level_number" INTEGER /* Number of the vertical level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vertical level */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the vertical level */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure at the vertical level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vertical_levels_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spatial_domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spatial domain */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated dataset */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the spatial domain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the spatial domain */,
  "latitude_range" TEXT /* Range of latitudes covered by the domain */,
  "longitude_range" TEXT /* Range of longitudes covered by the domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_domains_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated dataset */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., W/m2) */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor for the unit, if applicable */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Physical dimension of the unit (e.g., energy, temperature) */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Standard or system of units (e.g., SI, imperial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)
